name: marketing agencies managing 5-15 campaigns/month tool
description: For marketing agencies managing 5-15 campaigns/month, inefficient budget allocation causes suboptimal campaign performance. We provide automated performance analysis and budget suggestions instead of manual tracking and adjustments using spreadsheets.
